fato_historico: 1933: Nazi eugenics programme begins with the proclamation of the Law for the Prevention of Hereditarily Diseased Offspring requiring the compulsory sterilization of any citizen who suffers from alleged genetic disorders.
energia_do_dia: The moon encourages you to focus on the sanctity of your unique spirit. Just as society has evolved to embrace the diverse beauty within every human thread, it is a good time to honor your authentic self. Perhaps today you might celebrate the strength found in your own journey, letting your gentle heart shine with warmth and inclusive kindness.
frase_do_dia: Your unique light is the greatest gift you can share with the world today.
significado_numero: A powerful cycle of growth, renewal, and manifesting your deepest heartfelt desires.
conselho: Consider practicing self-compassion by embracing every beautiful part of your inner truth.
